summary: Executed backend + frontend regression testing for notification center and sound-alert settings on public preview URL. Verified ALRT topbar button, notifications modal content, settings Sound Alerts toggle presence, status banner/ticker rendering, history page rendering, and proxy endpoint health.
action_items: Run one manual wallet-extension pass to validate real sound playback behavior during live order lifecycle events (automation confirmed UI/state only).
critical_code_review_comments: settings-sound-alerts-toggle uses a visually hidden checkbox with custom slider UI; automation should assert presence/checked state (not visibility) to avoid false failures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on https://quick-fix-71.preview.emergentagent.com from frontend/.env. Confirmed: ALRT topbar button renders, notifications modal opens, at least one notification item appears after Settings Save, Sound Alerts toggle exists in Settings, status banner and activity ticker render, History page content loads, and backend proxy pytest suite passes 7/7.
rca of the issue: No blocking regression issue reproduced in requested scope. One transient automation failure was a test-selector visibility mismatch against hidden checkbox input for custom toggles; resolved by asserting element existence + label visibility.
mocked_api: NO MOCKED APIs used in this testing run
